/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/iq_pipeline.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iq_pipeline.dir/src/producer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iq_pipeline.dir/src/consumer.cpp.o -o iq_pipeline
